name: Orora Limited
analysis: ORA has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 40% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$1.4350, stop A$1.2276, target A$1.9850 (2.65:1) — then trail it.
